evals.prompt: 我们要给设备管理模块加批量导入功能，从Excel导入设备列表并自动分配到对应租户。项目根目录有 AGENTS.md、REPO_WIKI.md 和 docs/ 目录，知识库结构完整。帮我写这个需求的规格（spec.md）。
evals.expected_output: 一份完整的 spec.md，包含背景目标、非目标、业务规则（引用知识库）、正常流程、异常流程、影响范围、验收标准、风险与回滚。
assertions: reads-knowledge-base-first: transcript mentions reading AGENTS.md, REPO_WIKI.md, or relevant docs before writing the spec
has-background-and-goals: spec.md contains a background/目标 section explaining why the feature exists
has-explicit-business-rules: spec.md contains at least 2 explicit business rules
cites-knowledge-doc-for-tenant-rule: spec.md references the multi-tenant isolation doc for tenant-related rules
has-exception-flows: spec.md includes exception flows (permission failure, duplicate import, invalid format)
has-acceptance-criteria: spec.md contains specific, verifiable acceptance criteria
flags-tenant-isolation-as-high-risk: spec.md explicitly flags multi-tenant isolation as a risk or high-risk area

evals.prompt: 正在为告警规则配置功能写测试用例：设备离线超5分钟触发告警，需要支持多租户隔离。项目使用 thingcom 知识库结构（AGENTS.md + REPO_WIKI.md + docs/）。帮我写 test-cases.md。
evals.expected_output: 一份完整的 test-cases.md，覆盖正常场景、异常场景（设备离线、租户越界、重复上报、权限不足）、状态不变量、回归点。
assertions: references-testing-baseline: output mentions docs/08-testing/核心测试场景库.md or its must-test categories
covers-device-offline: test case for device offline handling (alert after 5min)
covers-tenant-boundary-violation: test case for cross-tenant access
covers-duplicate-reports: test case for duplicate/repeated alert reports
covers-permission-insufficient: test case for insufficient permissions
covers-normal-flow: normal/happy path test cases present
structured-table-or-list: test cases in structured table or numbered list format

evals.prompt: 刚修了个线上 bug：删除检验台记录时没有检查绑定关系，导致数据孤岛。bug 已修复。项目使用 thingcom 知识库结构（docs/10-incidents/、docs/02-business-rules/、docs/08-testing/）。帮我把这次 bug 经验写回知识库（知识回灌）。
evals.expected_output: 明确的知识回灌计划，包含：缺陷案例索引条目（实际内容）、根因分类、补测试建议、业务规则文档更新、测试场景库更新，以及每项更新的原因说明。
assertions: mentions-incident-index: output explicitly mentions updating docs/10-incidents/缺陷案例索引.md
provides-incident-entry-content: actual written content for the incident entry provided
classifies-root-cause: root cause type classified (e.g., 业务规则缺失)
mentions-test-patch: adding a deletion guard test case mentioned
mentions-business-rule-doc: updating a business rule doc to capture the deletion guard rule
mentions-testing-scenarios: updating docs/08-testing/核心测试场景库.md mentioned
explains-why-each-update: reasoning behind each knowledge doc update explained
